evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: enhance data quality, efficiency, and delivery; performance, robustness and scalability; best practices; data testing
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour dominates: emphasis on quality, robustness, scalability, and best practices with no velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Product analytics for SaaS startup—low risk without commercial/financial/compliance framing.
evidence.data_team_maturity: GCP tools; dbt, Airflow, Looker; product data modeling
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: named GCP tools and established product analytics infrastructure.
evidence.jd_authorship: Utilizing GCP tools including dbt, Airflow and Looker; Identifying and resolving data quality issues; Establishing best practices for naming conventions and data testing
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools (dbt, Airflow, Looker, GCP) and methodologies (testing, best practices) show hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: product; cross-functional communication; technical and non-technical teams
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product-focused: data modeling and reporting for product team analytics.
evidence.autonomy_level: Identifying and resolving; Establishing best practices; Developing data solutions
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: support-oriented with some ownership in technical domain but no strategic direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI or AI-assisted work expected from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing: Establishing best practices for naming conventions and data testing
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data testing is framed as owned responsibility (establish best practices).
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: data quality; performance, robustness; prevention and alerting
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data quality and operational reliability are concerns but not compliance/risk-driven.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: focus on improving data quality and implementing systems within existing infrastructure.
evidence.work_arrangement: Vilnius, Lithuania (4 days onsite, 1 flexible remote day)
